title: Design Glassmorphic UI Dashboard
description: Create high-fidelity mockups and draft CSS custom properties for the new dark-mode glassmorphic theme.

title: Implement Native Node HTTP Backend
description: Build server.js using Node.js core 'http' module. Write custom routing logic, request body parsing, and CORS headers handling.

title: Stock up on coffee and snacks
description: Buy double espresso pods, dark chocolate, and mixed nuts for late-night coding sessions.
